title: Rhabdophyllum discolor
taxonomy: Rhabdophyllum discolor is a species of flowering plant in the family Sapindaceae. It is native to tropical Africa. Rhabdophyllum discolor is placed in the tribe Pauletteae. The plant is sometimes classified as a member of the genus Paullinia, but this classification is not universally accepted. Further research may be needed to fully understand its classification.
uses: Rhabdophyllum discolor is reported to have various medicinal properties in traditional African medicine, particularly in the Democratic Republic of Congo.
